overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an FBI agent exploring a dense, foggy forest. The character walks along a dirt trail, discovers and loots a supply box, and continues toward a mysterious cabin in the woods. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with heavy fog and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail with supply cache ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward a supply box visible ahead through the fog

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming dense canopy on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with scattered leaves
bushes with yellow and orange autumn foliage lining the path
gray metal supply box with yellow markings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy forest trail with dense trees and autumn undergrowth. The FBI agent walks forward along the dirt path toward a supply box visible ahead. The atmosphere is quiet and enveloped in thick fog with diffused morning light filtering through the canopy.

events.description: character opens the supply box lid revealing contents inside
character retrieves a coffee mug item from the supply box

agents.ego_description: approaching the supply box, opening it, and collecting an item from inside

entered.detail: weathered wooden folding chair with woven seat visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The agent reaches the supply box and interacts with it, opening the lid to retrieve an item. A wooden lawn chair becomes visible to the left side of the clearing. The camera moves closer to the box, focusing on the interaction while the dense foggy forest surrounds the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with fern undergrowth

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the wooden chair and through terrain with large rocks and dense ferns

entered.detail: moss-covered stone wall or rock face partially visible through trees
decaying logs lying on the forest floor among ferns
large boulders and rocky outcrops emerging from the vegetation

segments.scene_description: Leaving the supply box behind, the agent walks past the wooden chair and enters a rockier section of the forest. The path winds through dense ferns and past moss-covered stone walls. The terrain becomes more rugged with visible boulders and fallen logs scattered among the undergrowth.

events.description: dark wooden cabin becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a dark cabin visible through the foggy trees

entered.detail: dark weathered wooden cabin with small windows nestled among the trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the agent approaching a dark wooden cabin through the foggy woods. The rocky terrain gives way to a clearer path as the cabin becomes visible in the distance. The atmosphere remains tense and mysterious as the character draws closer to the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy autumn forest that transitions from a quiet dirt trail to a rugged, rocky approach toward a mysterious cabin. It begins with the FBI agent walking along a path enveloped in thick fog and diffused morning light, moving steadily toward a supply box visible ahead. As the agent reaches the box to retrieve an item, the camera tightens on the interaction, momentarily revealing a wooden lawn chair resting in the clearing. The scene then shifts as the agent leaves the box behind, winding through a more rugged terrain characterized by moss-covered stone walls, dense ferns, and scattered boulders. Finally, the rocky ground gives way to a clearer path as the camera follows the character toward a dark wooden cabin emerging from the persistent mist.
